problem: What triggers cancer cells to leave primary tumor and colonize new tissue?
hypothesis: Combining Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
